name: prepzify
description: Prepzify — AI-powered campus placement preparation platform (monorepo root)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.clean: npm run clean --prefix backend && npm run clean --prefix frontend
